name: Ravindu Sooriyaarachchi
tagline: Bridging core technology concepts with hands-on digital skills training
shortBio: I conduct the Free ICT Course at SITC Campus, combining my background in software development with a practical, student-first approach focused on real outcomes.
fullBio: I am the lead instructor for the SITC Free ICT Course, guiding students through practical, structured, and outcome-focused sessions. As an undergraduate at the Sri Lanka Institute of Information Technology (SLIIT) with a strong focus on software architecture, testing, and Android development, I help students bridge the gap between foundational computer skills and workplace-ready technical abilities.
experience: Instructor at SITC Campus and active software development practitioner
credentials: Undergraduate at Sri Lanka Institute of Information Technology (SLIIT)
Lead ICT Instructor at SITC Campus
